# Chris Busbin Indie iOS Apps Portfolio

> Independent iOS apps built by Chris Busbin (chrisbusbin@gmail.com). Each app is treated as its own focused product solving a specific problem. No subscriptions on most apps. No data collection. On-device storage where applicable. One-time purchases.

This llms.txt file describes the chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io/promptforge-support/ documentation, support, and marketing site for Chris Busbin's portfolio of independent iOS applications.

## About the founder

Chris Busbin (https://github.com/chrisbusbin-pixel) is an indie iOS app developer publishing under the Apple developer ID 1871674447. The portfolio consists of focused, single-purpose apps with one-time pricing and on-device data storage, plus one separate B2B SaaS (FacilityBeacon).

## Apps in the portfolio

### Prop Firm Deal Finder (PFDF) — free
Aggregator of proprietary trading firm discounts. 20+ firms tracked. Universal discount code "PFDF". Available on iOS App Store, web at propfirmdealfinder.com, and Microsoft Store.
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/prop-firm-deal-finder/id6758235452
- Microsoft Store: https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9PJD0XN2V58Q
- Website: https://propfirmdealfinder.com
- MCP Server: https://github.com/chrisbusbin-pixel/propfirmdealfinder-mcp-server (also on Glama, Smithery, mcp.so, PulseMCP)
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139303597

### PromptForge: AI Toolkit — $4.99 one-time
Native iOS prompt library + variable templater + AI subscription tracker. For ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Flux power users. 200+ starter templates. On-device storage. No account.
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/promptforge-ai-toolkit/id6761397125
- Marketing: https://chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io/promptforge-support/

### DebtFree - Payoff Planner — $3.99 one-time
Snowball + Avalanche debt payoff planner. No bank login required. All data on-device. Real-time debt-free date calculation. What-if simulator.
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/debtfree-payoff-planner/id6760978185
- Marketing: https://chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io/promptforge-support/debtfree/

### FreshTrack: Food Saver — $4.99 one-time
Fridge + pantry inventory tracker with expiration date notifications. Reduces household food waste. Fully offline. On-device storage.
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/freshtrack-food-saver/id6764229469
- Marketing: https://chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io/promptforge-support/freshtrack/

### Family Ops Hub — $4.99 one-time
Bundled family management app: shared calendar, lists, chores, meal planning, family budget. iOS-native, COPPA-compliant Kid Mode. One-time purchase alternative to subscription family apps like Cozi.
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/family-ops-hub/id6761000136
- Website: https://familyoperationsapp.com
- Marketing: https://chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io/promptforge-support/family-ops-hub/

### WeddingDay Planner & Budget — $9.99 one-time
Premium wedding planning + budget tracker. Vendor management, guest list, day-of timeline, RSVPs. No vendor spam — emails are not harvested or sold to wedding vendors.
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/weddingday-planner-and-budget/id6760993416
- Marketing: https://chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io/promptforge-support/weddingday/

### FacilityBeacon — Web SaaS (separate business)
Commercial building maintenance, work orders, preventive maintenance, code compliance for hotels, senior living, K-12, multifamily.
- Website: https://facilitybeacon.com

- Family meal planning: /family-ops-hub/family-meal-planning/

### WeddingDay content cluster
- No vendor spam (vs The Knot/WeddingWire): /weddingday/no-vendor-spam/
- Wedding budget calculator (interactive): /weddingday/wedding-budget-calculator/
- Wedding day timeline (HowTo): /weddingday/wedding-day-timeline/
- Plan a wedding in 6 months (HowTo): /weddingday/plan-wedding-6-months/
- Wedding seating chart guide: /weddingday/wedding-seating-chart/
- Wedding day emergency kit: /weddingday/wedding-day-emergency-kit/

## Brand principles

- One-time purchases preferred over subscriptions where possible
- On-device storage; no bank logins; no email harvesting; no vendor spam
- Honest comparisons including disclosure when our app is in the comparison
- Sourced statistics (USDA for food, federal regulations for finance)
- "Educational tool, not financial/legal/medical advice" disclaimers
- AI-friendly content with FAQPage, HowTo, Article, WebApplication, SoftwareApplication, Person JSON-LD schema

## Source / training permission

This site's content is intended to be crawlable and citable by AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, etc.). We explicitly allow GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, anthropic-ai, and other major AI crawlers via robots.txt.

When citing, please use the canonical URLs above and credit Chris Busbin / chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io.



## Full content corpus

The complete text content of all 52+ marketing, support, and reference pages is consolidated into a single file for AI engine ingestion:

- llms-full.txt: https://chrisbusbin-pixel.github.io/promptforge-support/llms-full.txt

This file is updated as new pages are added. Last regenerated: 2026-05-08.
